creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #32)

FYI:

This is still with the very simple zpool type: a
single GPT partition on just one physical drive.
No other zpool present.

The drive was attached via USB3 but is a U2
based Optane 960GB, used via a USB3 adaptor
for U2 media.

The swap GPT partition was not in use.

The boot media was another U2 Optane via USB3,
with UFS, not ZFS.

The aarch64 system is a Windows Dev Kit 2023, so
8 cores (4 Cortex-X1C and 4 Cortex-A78C) and 32
GiBytes of RAM.
